mapper.select: SELECT CAST(${tableSpec.statDateColumn} AS CHAR) AS statDate, COALESCE(SUM(${tableSpec.orderCountExpression}), 0) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(${tableSpec.paidOrderCountExpression}), 0) AS paidOrderCount, COALESCE(SUM(${tableSpec.unpaidOrderCountExpression}), 0) AS unpaidOrderCount, COALESCE(SUM(${tableSpec.closedOrderCountExpression}), 0) AS closedOrderCount, COALESCE(SUM(${tableSpec.totalAmountExpression}), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(${tableSpec.paidAmountExpression}), 0) AS paidAmount, COALESCE(SUM(${tableSpec.refundAmountExpression}), 0) AS refundAmount, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(${tableSpec.orderCountExpression}), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND( CAST(COALESCE(SUM(${tableSpec.paidOrderCountExpression}), 0) AS DECIMAL(18, 4)) / COALESCE(SUM(${tableSpec.orderCountExpression}), 0), 4 ) END AS paySuccessRate FROM ${tableSpec.tableName} WHERE ${tableSpec.statDateColumn} >= #{startDate} AND ${tableSpec.statDateColumn} <= #{endDate} GROUP BY ${tableSpec.statDateColumn} ORDER BY ${tableSpec.statDateColumn} ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ods_wx_order ( order_id, order_no, external_order_no, biz_type, order_source, order_title, order_description, buyer_id, buyer_nickname, currency, total_amount_fen, payable_amount_fen, paid_amount_fen, refunded_amount_fen, order_status, pay_status, preferred_pay_platform, preferred_trade_type, success_pay_platform, latest_payment_order_no, latest_channel_order_no, paid_time, expired_time, closed_time, cancelled_time, remark, ext_json, version, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, sync_time ) VALUES
( #{item.orderId}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.externalOrderNo}, #{item.bizType}, #{item.orderSource}, #{item.orderTitle}, #{item.orderDescription}, #{item.buyerId}, #{item.buyerNickname}, #{item.currency}, #{item.totalAmountFen}, #{item.payableAmountFen}, #{item.paidAmountFen}, #{item.refundedAmountFen}, #{item.orderStatus}, #{item.payStatus}, #{item.preferredPayPlatform}, #{item.preferredTradeType}, #{item.successPayPlatform}, #{item.latestPaymentOrderNo}, #{item.latestChannelOrderNo}, #{item.paidTime}, #{item.expiredTime}, #{item.closedTime}, #{item.cancelledTime}, #{item.remark}, #{item.extJson}, #{item.version}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.updatedBy}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO ods_wx_payment_order ( payment_order_id, payment_order_no, order_id, order_no, platform, trade_type, merchant_code, channel_app_id, channel_merchant_id, subject, description, currency, request_amount_fen, success_amount_fen, payer_id, client_ip, notify_url, channel_order_no, channel_prepay_id, code_url, status, fail_code, fail_message, expired_time, success_time, closed_time, last_notify_time, ext_json, version, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, sync_time ) VALUES
( #{item.paymentOrderId}, #{item.paymentOrderNo}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.platform}, #{item.tradeType}, #{item.merchantCode}, #{item.channelAppId}, #{item.channelMerchantId}, #{item.subject}, #{item.description}, #{item.currency}, #{item.requestAmountFen}, #{item.successAmountFen}, #{item.payerId}, #{item.clientIp}, #{item.notifyUrl}, #{item.channelOrderNo}, #{item.channelPrepayId}, #{item.codeUrl}, #{item.status}, #{item.failCode}, #{item.failMessage}, #{item.expiredTime}, #{item.successTime}, #{item.closedTime}, #{item.lastNotifyTime}, #{item.extJson}, #{item.version}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.updatedBy}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO ods_wx_payment_notify ( notify_log_id, notify_id, platform, notify_type, payment_order_id, payment_order_no, order_id, order_no, channel_order_no, event_type, event_status, summary, request_headers_json, request_body, encrypt_type, resource_ciphertext, resource_nonce, resource_associated_data, signature_serial_no, signature_value, process_status, process_message, processed_at, received_at, ext_json, sync_time ) VALUES
( #{item.notifyLogId}, #{item.notifyId}, #{item.platform}, #{item.notifyType}, #{item.paymentOrderId}, #{item.paymentOrderNo}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.channelOrderNo}, #{item.eventType}, #{item.eventStatus}, #{item.summary}, #{item.requestHeadersJson}, #{item.requestBody}, #{item.encryptType}, #{item.resourceCiphertext}, #{item.resourceNonce}, #{item.resourceAssociatedData}, #{item.signatureSerialNo}, #{item.signatureValue}, #{item.processStatus}, #{item.processMessage}, #{item.processedAt}, #{item.receivedAt}, #{item.extJson}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO dw_sync_job ( job_code, job_name, source_type, source_tables, target_tables, enabled, remark, last_run_status, last_run_message, last_run_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{job.jobCode}, #{job.jobName}, #{job.sourceType}, #{job.sourceTables}, #{job.targetTables}, #{job.enabled}, #{job.remark}, #{job.lastRunStatus}, #{job.lastRunMessage}, #{job.lastRunAt}, #{job.createdAt}, #{job.updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO dw_sync_job_log ( log_id, job_code, job_name, run_status, message, synced_order_count, synced_payment_order_count, synced_notify_log_count, started_at, finished_at, duration_ms, created_at ) VALUES ( #{log.logId}, #{log.jobCode}, #{log.jobName}, #{log.runStatus}, #{log.message}, #{log.syncedOrderCount}, #{log.syncedPaymentOrderCount}, #{log.syncedNotifyLogCount}, #{log.startedAt}, #{log.finishedAt}, #{log.durationMs}, #{log.createdAt} )

INSERT INTO dw_job_log ( log_id, job_code, job_name, job_type, source_type, source_tables, target_tables, run_status, message, metric_one_label, metric_one_value, metric_two_label, metric_two_value, metric_three_label, metric_three_value, started_at, finished_at, duration_ms, created_at ) VALUES ( #{log.logId}, #{log.jobCode}, #{log.jobName}, #{log.jobType}, #{log.sourceType}, #{log.sourceTables}, #{log.targetTables}, #{log.runStatus}, #{log.message}, #{log.metricOneLabel}, #{log.metricOneValue}, #{log.metricTwoLabel}, #{log.metricTwoValue}, #{log.metricThreeLabel}, #{log.metricThreeValue}, #{log.startedAt}, #{log.finishedAt}, #{log.durationMs}, #{log.createdAt} )

INSERT INTO dw_meta_datasource ( datasource_code, datasource_name, datasource_type, host, port, database_name, owner, description, enabled, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{datasource.datasourceCode}, #{datasource.datasourceName}, #{datasource.datasourceType}, #{datasource.host}, #{datasource.port}, #{datasource.databaseName}, #{datasource.owner}, #{datasource.description}, #{datasource.enabled}, #{datasource.createdAt}, #{datasource.updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO dw_meta_table ( table_code, datasource_code, table_name, table_layer, table_category, table_comment, owner, refresh_strategy, column_count, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{table.tableCode}, #{table.datasourceCode}, #{table.tableName}, #{table.tableLayer}, #{table.tableCategory}, #{table.tableComment}, #{table.owner}, #{table.refreshStrategy}, #{table.columnCount}, #{table.createdAt}, #{table.updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO dw_meta_column ( table_code, column_name, data_type, nullable_flag, column_comment, column_order, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.tableCode}, #{item.columnName}, #{item.dataType}, #{item.nullableFlag}, #{item.columnComment}, #{item.columnOrder}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO dw_lineage_relation ( relation_id, relation_type, upstream_datasource_code, upstream_table_code, downstream_datasource_code, downstream_table_code, transform_name, enabled, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.relationId}, #{item.relationType}, #{item.upstreamDatasourceCode}, #{item.upstreamTableCode}, #{item.downstreamDatasourceCode}, #{item.downstreamTableCode}, #{item.transformName}, #{item.enabled}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO dw_alert_record ( alert_id, alert_type, alert_level, alert_source, source_code, source_name, alert_status, alert_title, alert_message, fired_at, resolved_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{alert.alertId}, #{alert.alertType}, #{alert.alertLevel}, #{alert.alertSource}, #{alert.sourceCode}, #{alert.sourceName}, #{alert.alertStatus}, #{alert.alertTitle}, #{alert.alertMessage}, #{alert.firedAt}, #{alert.resolvedAt}, #{alert.createdAt} )

INSERT INTO dw_quality_rule ( rule_code, rule_name, table_name, rule_level, rule_type, rule_sql, total_sql, threshold_value, enabled, rule_order, description, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.ruleCode}, #{item.ruleName}, #{item.tableName}, #{item.ruleLevel}, #{item.ruleType}, #{item.ruleSql}, #{item.totalSql}, #{item.thresholdValue}, #{item.enabled}, #{item.ruleOrder}, #{item.description}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO dw_quality_result ( result_id, rule_code, rule_name, table_name, result_status, result_level, failed_count, total_count, pass_count, threshold_value, message, checked_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{result.resultId}, #{result.ruleCode}, #{result.ruleName}, #{result.tableName}, #{result.resultStatus}, #{result.resultLevel}, #{result.failedCount}, #{result.totalCount}, #{result.passCount}, #{result.thresholdValue}, #{result.message}, #{result.checkedAt}, #{result.createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT CAST(log_id AS CHAR) AS logId, CAST(job_code AS CHAR) AS jobCode, CAST(job_name AS CHAR) AS jobName, CAST(run_status AS CHAR) AS runStatus, CAST(message AS CHAR) AS message, synced_order_count AS syncedOrderCount, synced_payment_order_count AS syncedPaymentOrderCount, synced_notify_log_count AS syncedNotifyLogCount, started_at AS startedAt, finished_at AS finishedAt, duration_ms AS durationMs, created_at AS createdAt FROM dw_sync_job_log WHERE job_code = #{jobCode} ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT CAST(datasource_code AS CHAR) AS datasourceCode, CAST(datasource_name AS CHAR) AS datasourceName, CAST(datasource_type AS CHAR) AS datasourceType, CAST(host AS CHAR) AS host, port AS port, CAST(database_name AS CHAR) AS databaseName, CAST(owner AS CHAR) AS owner, CAST(description AS CHAR) AS description, enabled AS enabled FROM dw_meta_datasource ORDER BY datasource_code ASC

SELECT CAST(table_code AS CHAR) AS tableCode, CAST(column_name AS CHAR) AS columnName, CAST(data_type AS CHAR) AS dataType, nullable_flag AS nullableFlag, CAST(column_comment AS CHAR) AS columnComment, column_order AS columnOrder FROM dw_meta_column WHERE table_code = #{tableCode} ORDER BY column_order ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT CAST(job_code AS CHAR) AS jobCode, CAST(job_name AS CHAR) AS jobName, CAST(source_type AS CHAR) AS sourceType, CAST(source_tables AS CHAR) AS sourceTables, CAST(target_tables AS CHAR) AS targetTables, enabled AS enabled, CAST(remark AS CHAR) AS remark, CAST(last_run_status AS CHAR) AS lastRunStatus, CAST(last_run_message AS CHAR) AS lastRunMessage, CAST(last_run_at AS CHAR) AS lastRunAt FROM dw_sync_job ORDER BY job_code ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT CAST(rule_code AS CHAR) AS ruleCode, CAST(rule_name AS CHAR) AS ruleName, CAST(table_name AS CHAR) AS tableName, CAST(rule_level AS CHAR) AS ruleLevel, CAST(rule_type AS CHAR) AS ruleType, threshold_value AS thresholdValue, enabled AS enabled, rule_order AS ruleOrder, CAST(description AS CHAR) AS description FROM dw_quality_rule ORDER BY rule_order ASC, rule_code ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT ${tableSpec.ruleCodeExpression} AS ruleCode, ${tableSpec.ruleNameExpression} AS ruleName, ${tableSpec.tableNameExpression} AS tableName, ${tableSpec.resultStatusExpression} AS resultStatus, ${tableSpec.resultLevelExpression} AS resultLevel, ${tableSpec.failedCountExpression} AS failedCount, ${tableSpec.totalCountExpression} AS totalCount, ${tableSpec.messageExpression} AS message, ${tableSpec.checkedAtExpression} AS checkedAt FROM ${tableSpec.tableName} ORDER BY ${tableSpec.checkedAtOrderExpression} DESC LIMIT #{limit}
